issues.detail: Instructions are not clearly defined and lack explicit guidance for the agent.
Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Explanatory text is verbose and includes padding.
Skill is vendor-locked to React and does not work with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Selectable, draggable, resizable shapes
scenarios.rationale: Both use Stage/Layer with draggable shapes, click-to-select, empty-stage deselect via e.target === e.target.getStage(), and a conditional Transformer; treatment additionally enforces a minimum size with boundBoxFunc as the skill specifies.

scenarios.name: Image annotator with drag-to-draw bounding boxes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wraps each annotation in a Group with a labeled Text positioned above (y - 20), uses dashed stroke on the in-progress rect, and filters tiny rects (Math.abs(width) > 10) per the skill; baseline draws plain rects without label, dash, or size filter.
